descriptions: 28s street gang is a rival of The Americans.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids, The Terrible West Siders, The Fancy Boys, 6bop gang, Mongrels, Young Gifteds and Terrible Josters.

descriptions: Green Ones fought with Cuckoos over bootlegging rackets.
edges.evidence_quote: Giannola attempted to take control of the bootlegging rackets in the area and fought with members of the Egan's Rats gang and Cuckoos Gang.

descriptions: Scofano-Martello-La Rosa killed the boss of 'Ndrina Serpa, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Francescopio Serpe, boss della famiglia negli anni '90 e nei primi anni '2000, prima di essere ucciso dai rivali Scofano-Martello-La Rosa il 27 maggio 2003

descriptions: Minore clan led the Trapani Mafia family from the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: From the 1950s, the Minore clan led the Trapani Mafia family

descriptions: Jamiat-e Islami is a non-state opponent of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state opponents ... Jamiat-e Islami

descriptions: Mongrels is a rival of The Americans.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids, Ghetto Kids, Nice Time Kids, The Terrible West Siders, The Fancy Boys, 6bop gang, Mongrels, Young Gifteds and Terrible Josters.

Black Mafia.description: The Black Mafia was a Philadelphia-based African-American organized crime syndicate founded around 1969 by Samuel Christian. It controlled drug trafficking, extortion, and other rackets in Philadelphia and the Delaware Valley during the 1970s and early 1980s. The group was known for its use of intimidation and violence, with over 40 murders attributed to it. It became largely defunct by 1984, though a successor group, the Junior Black Mafia, operated until 1992.

descriptions: The Gambino Crime Family did business with the Black Mafia, supplying drugs.
edges.evidence_quote: Angelo Bruno , the don of the Philadelphia crime family , discouraged drug dealing in South Philadelphia, but could not prevent deals being made by the New York mafia families such as the Gambino Crime Family , which were doing business with the growing black organized crime that became the Black Mafia

descriptions: The Junior Black Mafia is a successor or later iteration of the Black Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Years active: c. 1969–1984 , c. 1985–1992 (JBM)

descriptions: Black Mafia members created the JBM as a successor organization.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1985, members of the original Black Mafia organized African-American youths into the Junior Black Mafia (JBM), also known as the Young Black Mafia, in order to counter and regain territory from New York-based Jamaican posses who had rapidly taken control of drug distribution in the black neighborhoods of Philadelphia.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Philadelphia crime family as an ally of the Black Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: The Council , Nation of Islam , Philadelphia crime family

descriptions: The infobox lists the Shower Posse as a rival of the Black Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Shower Posse , and various other gangs in the Philadelphia area, including their allies

descriptions: Black Mafia superseded the weakened Ghetto Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Black Mafia (BM) was one of the gangs that superseded the now weakened and fragmented Ghetto Boys

descriptions: The Black Mafia formed to take control from the Philadelphia family, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1970, Samuel "Beyah" Christian and other African-American organized crime figures formed the Black Mafia to take control of illegal activities in the Black neighborhoods of Philadelphia from the Italian Mafia, a venture which was partially successful.

descriptions: Listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Mafia

Clan dei Barcellonesi.description: Mafia clan originating from Barcellona Pozzo di Gotto, Sicily. Active since the second half of the 20th century, it was involved in the 1986 maxi-trial in Messina. The clan's structure is described as chaotic with shifting alliances, and it has connections with other mafia groups including the Santapaola family of Catania and Calabrian and Neapolitan organizations.

descriptions: The Barcellonesi were also allied with the Batanesi faction of the Nebrodi mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: l'ala rimasta "barcellonese" era alleata della fazione dei Santapaola di Cosa Nostra catanese ed anche dei "Batanesi", altra fazione della mafia dei Nebrodi

descriptions: The Barcellonesi faction was allied with the Santapaola clan of Catania.
edges.evidence_quote: l'ala rimasta "barcellonese" era alleata della fazione dei Santapaola di Cosa Nostra catanese

descriptions: The Barcellonesi and Chiofaliani were in conflict, with many murders between them.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra fine anni '80 e gli anni '90, tra Barcellona , Terme Vigliatore , Mazzarrà , Novara di Sicilia e Falcone furono assassinate numerose vittime per ragioni di mafia e per contrasti tra il nuovo gruppo di Pino Chiofalo, ormai definitivamente separato da quello dei barcellonesi, e questi ultimi

descriptions: The Mazzarroti shifted their allegiance towards the Barcellonesi after 1991.
edges.evidence_quote: I "mazzarroti" invece con l'uccisione nel 1991 del boss Giuseppe Trifirò, spostarono la loro posizione mafiosa sempre più verso la compagine barcellonese

descriptions: Rosario Cattafi, a Barcellonese boss, was linked to the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: oltre ad essere legato ai Corleonesi di Totò Riina

descriptions: Outfit associate Frank Cullotta was involved with the Hole in the Wall gang, indicating a link between the Outfit and the gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Frank Cullotta ... was a former associate and friend of Tony Spilotro, and was involved in his Hole in the Wall gang based in Las Vegas.

descriptions: The Hole in the Wall Gang was a crew formed by a Chicago Outfit member while overseeing Outfit interests, but no direct operational tie is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Spilotro moved to Las Vegas to help oversee the local concerns of the Chicago Outfit... Bored with his new assignment, Spilotro formed a burglary crew later dubbed the 'Hole in the Wall Gang.'

Lenox Avenue Gang.description: Early 20th-century New York City street gang based in Harlem, founded in the early 1900s by Harry Horowitz. It consisted mostly of pickpockets and burglars, allied with the Eastman Gang. The gang was involved in muggings, robberies, and murder, notably the assassination of gambler Herman Rosenthal in 1912. After the execution of its leaders in 1914, the gang disbanded.

descriptions: Infobox lists Lenox Avenue Gang as an ally of Eastman Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Batavia Street Gang, Lenox Avenue Gang

descriptions: Listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Lenox Avenue Gang

descriptions: The Lenox Avenue Gang was allied with the Eastman Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Eastman Gang

descriptions: The East London and South London chapters merged into a single entity.
edges.evidence_quote: Both London chapters merged in 1973.

descriptions: Oakland Hells Angels sponsored the South London chapter, establishing it as a charter.
edges.evidence_quote: the South London chapter was sponsored by the Hells Angels in Oakland

descriptions: AQIM listed Ansar al-Sharia (Libya) as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Ansar al-Sharia (Libya) (2012–2017)

descriptions: Los Chapitos compete with Los Guanos faction.
edges.evidence_quote: They also compete with members of " Los Guanos " faction

descriptions: Los Guanos son aliados de Los Chapitos según el infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Guanos

descriptions: Los Ninis is rival to Los Guanos.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Los Guanos

descriptions: Los Guanos is a faction within Sinaloa.
edges.evidence_quote: tercera facción más pequeña conocida como los Guanos , liderada por Aureliano Guzmán Loera

descriptions: Bandidos patched over Ghostrider's chapters in Germany.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bandidos expanded into Germany in June 2000 when the club "patched over" seventeen chapters of the Ghostrider's, Road Eagles and Destroyers that had been serving as probationary chapters since the previous year.

Clan dei Casalesi.description: The Clan dei Casalesi is one of the most powerful Camorra clans and criminal organizations in Italy. It was created by Antonio Bardellino and originated in the municipalities of San Cipriano d'Aversa and Casal di Principe in the second half of the 20th century. The clan is active in Spain, Switzerland, and Romania, involved in cocaine trafficking, prostitution, construction, and money laundering.

descriptions: Members of the Casalesi were arrested in connection with Farao operations.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono stati arrestati pure Antonio e Vincenzo Noviello dei casalesi .

descriptions: Morabito trafficked drugs with the Casalesi camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorrista dei casalesi

descriptions: Morabito was involved in trafficking with the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: These clans were also involved in trafficking with the Camorra 's Casalesi clan.

descriptions: Alfieri faction was opposed to the Casalesi, who were supported by Buscetta.
edges.evidence_quote: i Casalesi di Bardellino erano invece sostenuti dai cosiddetti scappati come Tommaso Buscetta

descriptions: Infobox lists Casalesi clan as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Alfieri clan allied with the Casalesi clan during the internal war.
edges.evidence_quote: With Carmine Alfieri siding with Bardellino’s Casalesi clan

descriptions: Bardellino allied with Alfieri after breaking with Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino ... legò con quelli che poi sarebbero diventati i suoi alleati storici, e cioè Carmine Alfieri e Pasquale Galasso.

descriptions: Beneduce is organico (integral) to the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Mascolo: assassinato a Baia Domizia il 20 settembre 1988 per non avere ceduto alle richieste estorsive imposte dal clan Beneduce, organico ai casalesi.

descriptions: Bidognetti is a family group within the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 7 febbraio 2012 vengono sequestrati beni per 4 milioni di euro a carico dei fratelli Roma, imprenditori implicati in affari riguardanti il traffico illegale di rifiuti, coadiuvati con il gruppo del clan facente capo alla famiglia Bidognetti.

descriptions: Bardellino is a Camorra clan leader who strengthened ties with the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: La camorra sfrutta la città come base strategica e rafforza i legami con esponenti della criminalità locale, come ... Antonio Bardellino.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Casalesi clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Casalesi clan is present throughout the country, and according to the investigations into the clan, it has numerous Swiss bank accounts.

descriptions: The Casalesi are a Camorra clan that maintained a centralized structure.
edges.evidence_quote: Tuttavia, alcuni clan, come i Casalesi, riuscirono a mantenere una struttura più centralizzata.

descriptions: Clan dei Casalesi is a Camorra clan involved in waste trafficking with Chinese gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra i clan coinvolti in questa alleanza c'erano il clan dei Casalesi, il clan Fabbrocino e il clan Ascione.

descriptions: Zaza and Bardellino cooperated in cocaine distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: I boss della camorra Zaza e Bardellino la distribuiscono in Francia, Italia e Spagna.

descriptions: Zaza cooperated with Bardellino, who led the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: I boss della camorra Zaza e Bardellino la distribuiscono in Francia, Italia e Spagna.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Santapaola clan (Catania Mafia family) formed a criminal alliance with the Casalesi clan to fix prices in fruit and vegetable transport.
edges.evidence_quote: Italian authorities uncovered a criminal alliance between the Casalesi clan of the Camorra and the Santapaolas, forming what investigators describe as a price-fixing cartel

descriptions: The Casalesi, Mafia (Cosa Nostra), and 'Ndrangheta are linked in an axis, implying cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Operazione "Rischiatutto" . Asse Casalesi-Mafia-'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: The Casalesi have excellent relations with the Pesce/Bellocco clan.
edges.evidence_quote: ottimi rapporti intercorrerebbero tra i Casalesi e la cosca Pesce/ Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Cocaine shipment was destined for Mancuso, Pesce/Bellocco, and Piromalli, indicating cooperation with Casalesi as the shipment was intercepted in Salerno, a port used by Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: destinata ai Mancuso , Pesce/Bellocco e Piromalli

descriptions: The Casalesi have excellent relations with the Pesce/Bellocco clan.
edges.evidence_quote: ottimi rapporti intercorrerebbero tra i Casalesi e la cosca Pesce/ Bellocco di Rosarno

descriptions: Cocaine shipment was destined for Piromalli, indicating cooperation with Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: destinata ai Mancuso , Pesce/Bellocco e Piromalli

descriptions: The Alfieri clan is listed as an ally of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Alfieri clan (defunct)

descriptions: Casalesi and Alfieri were allied in a coalition against Nuvoletta and Gionta.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'ambito della faida tra le coalizioni Casalesi - Alfieri e Nuvoletta - Gionta

descriptions: The Bidognetti clan is a faction within the Casalesi, in conflict with the Schiavone.
edges.evidence_quote: Ci sarebbe stato un ulteriore indebolimento ai danni degli Schiavone dovuto ad un contrasto che questi avrebbero avuto con i Bidognetti

descriptions: The Camorra Casalesi clan is a sub-group of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra Casalesi clan rose in the 1980s, gaining control of large areas of the local economy 'partly by manipulating politicians and intimidating judges'.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Antonio Bardellino ... was a powerful Camorrista and boss of the Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a constituent part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Casalesi clan is a clan within the Camorra

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a clan within the Camorra organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The Spartacus Trial ... was a series of criminal trials, each specifically directed against the activities of the powerful Casalesi clan of the Camorra.

descriptions: Casalesi clan cooperated with Catania Mafia family.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2019, the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia of Catania dismantled a scheme between the Camorra's Mallardo clan and Casalesi clan and members of the powerful Catania Mafia family , led by Vincenzo Enrico Augusto Ercolano, son of Giuseppe Ercolano (deceased, but once an important member of the Catania's mafia) and Grazia Santapaola, the sister of the historical boss Benedetto Santapaola .

descriptions: The Catania Mafia family is listed as an ally of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Catania Mafia family

descriptions: The Casalesi clan allied with the Santapaola clan in a price-fixing cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Italian authorities have uncovered a criminal alliance between the Casalesi clan and the Catania Mafia family, headed by the Santapaola-Ercolano faction

descriptions: The Galasso clan is listed as an ally of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Galasso clan (defunct)

descriptions: The Casalesi clan shipped heroin to the Gambino and Genovese families.
edges.evidence_quote: le cui spedizioni dirette alla Famiglia Gambino e alla Famiglia Genovese erano nascoste all'interno dei filtri di caffè espresso

descriptions: The Lubrano-Ligato clan is listed as a rival of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Lubrano-Ligato clan

descriptions: Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans fought a war after NF disintegrated.
edges.evidence_quote: a war breaking out between the Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans towards the end of 1983

descriptions: Casalesi and Nuvoletta clans were in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The internal infighting between the Casalesi and Nuvoletta clans eventually culminated in the massacre at Torre Annunziata

descriptions: War between Casalesi (Bardellino) and Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the NF alliance soon disintegrated, with a war breaking out between the Bardellino and Nuvoletta clans towards the end of 1983.

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan is listed as a rival of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nuvoletta clan

descriptions: The two coalitions were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: nell'ambito della faida tra le coalizioni Casalesi - Alfieri e Nuvoletta - Gionta

descriptions: The Casalesi clan (under Bardellino) fought against the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Anche stavolta Mario Iovine si schierò con Antonio Bardellino per contrastare i fratelli Nuvoletta di Marano di Napoli

descriptions: Bardellino participated in the killing of Ciro Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: Sicari del clan Alfieri-Galasso-Bardellino entrarono nella tenuta e spararono all'impazzata uccidendo Ciro Nuvoletta

descriptions: The Casalesi clan acted as the armed wing of the Nuvoletta clan in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: Entrato in contatto con il clan Nuvoletta di Marano di Napoli, di cui costituì nel 1977 il braccio armato

descriptions: Casalesi and Alfieri were allied with Ferlito-Cappello.
edges.evidence_quote: i rivali Carmine Alfieri e i Casalesi erano alleati dei boss perdenti come Gaetano Badalamenti , Tommaso Buscetta e i clan catanesi Ferlito - Cappello

descriptions: Casalesi clan smuggled heroin to the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Heroin was smuggled as well, and shipments to the Gambino crime family were concealed inside espresso filters.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan smuggled heroin to the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Heroin was smuggled as well, and shipments to the Gambino crime family were concealed inside espresso filters.

descriptions: The Iavarazzo family was entrusted with the regency of the Casalesi in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2011 la reggenza del clan viene affidata alla famiglia Iavarazzo di Villa Literno , già imparentati con gli Schiavone.

descriptions: The Iovine faction is a faction within the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Mentre per la fazione Iovine, secondo la DDA risulta essere quasi totalmente assente dopo il pentimento del boss Antonio Iovine

descriptions: The La Torre clan is listed as a rival of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Torre clan (defunct)

descriptions: The Mallardo clan is listed as an ally of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mallardo clan

descriptions: The Casalesi clan fought against Nuova Camorra Organizzata (Cutolo's faction).
edges.evidence_quote: During the Camorra war of the 1980s, the Casalesi sided with Nuova Famiglia against Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: The Casalesi fought a war against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata, killing its members.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto un ruolo chiave nella guerra dei Casalesi contro la Nuova Camorra Organizzata, partecipando ai famigerati omicidi Pagano-Mennillo-Orsi-Gagliardi

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was allied with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Questi clan familiari negli anni '70 si erano legati alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata fondata nel 1970 da Raffaele Cutolo

descriptions: The Casalesi clan allied with Nuova Famiglia during the Camorra war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Camorra war of the 1980s, the Casalesi sided with Nuova Famiglia against Raffaele Cutolo.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was a founding component of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: Insieme ad Antonio Bardellino e gli altri clan di camorra dell'agro aversano, costituì la cosiddetta Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Casalesi were decreed to belong to the Nuova Famiglia alliance in 1986.
edges.evidence_quote: un primo riconoscimento dell'esistenza dell'organizzazione si ebbe nel 1986 con la sentenza del Tribunale di Santa Maria Capua Vetere nei confronti di Aldo Alessandri (conosciuto anche come " processo Bardellino ") che si concluse con diverse condanne e decretò l'appartenenza del clan alla Nuova Famiglia

descriptions: The Schiavone clan is a historical faction within the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Per quanto riguarda le varie fazioni storiche che da sempre hanno composto l'organizzazione, gli Schiavone risulterebbero i più indeboliti.

descriptions: The Zagaria faction is a faction within the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: Per quanto riguarda la fazione di Michele Zagaria , essa sarebbe quasi totalmente rivolta agli investimenti nell'economia legale

descriptions: Bardellino allied with Galasso after breaking with Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino ... legò con quelli che poi sarebbero diventati i suoi alleati storici, e cioè Carmine Alfieri e Pasquale Galasso.

descriptions: Clan Gionta entered into conflict with Antonio Bardellino's clan.
edges.evidence_quote: il clan entra in conflitto con Antonio Bardellino

descriptions: Giuliano and Casalesi clans were both members of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The clash ... led to the formation of the Nuova Famiglia, consisting particularly of the Giuliano clan, the Zaza clan, then headed by Michele Zaza, the Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan

descriptions: Pietro Lago was a lieutenant of Casalesi boss Antonio Bardellino, indicating a subordinate relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Lago venne indicato nei rapporti giudiziari come luogotenente, per Pianura e Soccavo , del capo storico dei Casalesi , Antonio Bardellino

descriptions: The Casalesi clan killed Raffaele Lubrano, a member of the Lubrano-Ligato clan, in a conflict over supremacy.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2002, il clan dei Casalesi ha ucciso Raffaele Lubrano, figlio di Vincenzo. Secondo gli inquirenti, l'omicidio è stato deciso dalla fazione Schiavone per riaffermare la supremazia dei Casalesi.

descriptions: Clan Magliulo had very close contacts with Clan dei Casalesi, and Mario Magliulo was a co-founder with Bardellino.
edges.evidence_quote: I Magliulo avevano avuto contatti molto stretti con il clan dei Casalesi; uno dei fondatori insieme ad Antonio Bardellino, boss storico dei Casalesi, fu Mario Magliulo, cognato di Bardellino.

descriptions: Clan Nuvoletta had rivalry with Bardellino clan.
edges.evidence_quote: emergono le rivalità tra i Nuvoletta e Bardellino

descriptions: Internal feud within Nuova Famiglia between Nuvoletta and Bardellino clans in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la caduta di Cutolo, nel 1983 scoppiò una faida interna nella NF tra il clan Nuvoletta e il clan Bardellino, che fu vinta dai secondi.

descriptions: Internal feud within Nuova Famiglia between the Nuvoletta and Bardellino clans in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la caduta di Cutolo, nel 1983 scoppiò una faida interna nella NF tra il clan Nuvoletta e il clan Bardellino, che fu vinta dai secondi.

descriptions: Clan Nuvoletta had rivalry with Bardellino, who led the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: emergono le rivalità tra i Nuvoletta e Bardellino

descriptions: Bardellino's clan attacked the Nuvoletta clan, killing Ciro Nuvoletta.
edges.evidence_quote: On 10 June 1984, a commando of approximately fifteen armed men led by Antonio Bardellino attacked the Nuvoletta stronghold

descriptions: The Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan fought an internal war after defeating the NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: war broke out among the anti-NCO coalition, in particular between the Nuvoletta clan from Marano and Antonio Bardellino at the end of 1983

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was a rival of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Casalesi clan

descriptions: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.
edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... Antonio Bardellino

descriptions: Bidognetti is a faction of the Clan dei Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: fazioni degli Schiavone e dei Bidognetti del clan dei casalesi

descriptions: Schiavone is a faction of the Clan dei Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: fazioni degli Schiavone e dei Bidognetti del clan dei casalesi

descriptions: The Gambino family lists Camorra Casalesi as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Camorra Casalesi clan, Chicago Outfit, ...

descriptions: Iovine is a faction of the Clan dei Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: esponente del clan della fazione Iovine

descriptions: Maniero made an agreement with a Casalesi member to split gambling proceeds in Modena.
edges.evidence_quote: Da segnalare è anche un accordo con Giuseppe Caterino, detto Peppinotto, appartenente al Clan dei Casalesi... Maniero e Caterino si accordarono per dividersi a metà i proventi del gioco d'azzardo nella città emiliana.

descriptions: Mallardo clan and Casalesi clan cooperated in a scheme with Catania Mafia family.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2019, the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia of Catania dismantled a scheme between the Camorra's Mallardo clan and Casalesi clan and members of the powerful Catania Mafia family , led by Vincenzo Enrico Augusto Ercolano, son of Giuseppe Ercolano (deceased, but once an important member of the Catania's mafia) and Grazia Santapaola, the sister of the historical boss Benedetto Santapaola .

descriptions: Casalesi clan is an ally of the Mallardo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Casalesi clan

descriptions: Mallardo and Casalesi clans allied to control wholesale markets.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mallardo and Casalesi clans in an alliance with the Catania Mafia family of the Cosa Nostra, had established violent control over key wholesale markets in Fondi and Giugliano.

descriptions: Mallardo, Casalesi, and a Catanese mafia family were in an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: la Direzione Investigativa Antimafia di Catania ha smantellato un'alleanza tra il clan Mallardo , il clan dei Casalesi e membri della potente famiglia mafiosa catanese

descriptions: The NCO fought against Bardellino and other entrepreneurial cartels.
time_periods: fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo (late 1970s-early 1980s)
edges.evidence_quote: Gli scontri tra NCO e cartelli “imprenditoriali” (Zaza, Nuvoletta, Bardellino e alleati)

descriptions: Most groups of the Nuova Camorra Speciale ended up gravitating around the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: la maggior parte di tali gruppi finì col gravitare attorno al clan dei Casalesi

descriptions: Bardellino faction fought against Nuvoletta-Gionta within Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo la fine della NCO, scoppiò una guerra all'interno della Nuova Famiglia , tra i Nuvoletta-Gionta contro i Bardellino-Alfieri.

descriptions: The Bardellino clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
time_periods: tra fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo (late 1970s-early 1980s)
edges.evidence_quote: Proprio tra fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo nacque, “d’intesa con Cosa nostra”, la Nuova Famiglia (NF) — asse Bardellino-Nuvoletta-Alfieri

descriptions: Casalesi were part of the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: consisting of Zaza, the Nuvoletta's and Antonio Bardellino from Casal Di Principe (the so-called "Casalesi")

descriptions: Casalesi joined the Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: Quando nella Nuova Famiglia subentrarono anche i Nuvoletta , gli Alfieri , i Galasso , i Misso della Sanità e soprattutto i Casalesi

descriptions: Bardellino clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance that became Nuova Famiglia.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono i Bardellino

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia allied with the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Successivamente la FN si alleò alle cosche e ai boss vicini alla mafia siciliana, tra cui ... il clan dei Casalesi.

descriptions: Bardellino, boss of Casalesi, was the main exponent of NF, so Casalesi is part of NF.
edges.evidence_quote: Bardellino was the main exponent of the Nuova Famiglia (NF)

descriptions: The Casalesi clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Antonio Bardellino, boss of the Casalesi clan

descriptions: Clan dei Casalesi was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: la Nuova Famiglia , in cui confluivano i Nuvoletta , il clan dei Casalesi con Antonio Bardellino , Umberto Ammaturo e il clan Alfieri

descriptions: Schiavone is an affiliated group of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 vengono sequestrati beni tra Caserta e Modena per un valore complessivo di cinquanta milioni di euro agli Schiavone, gruppo affiliato dei Casalesi guidato da Francesco Schiavone.

descriptions: Investigations show relationships between Società foggiana and Casalesi, including counterfeiting and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Le indagini hanno dimostrato come esistano rapporti tra Società foggiana e casalesi

descriptions: Turatello's gang cooperated with the Banda dei Marsigliesi in robberies and kidnappings.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang made billions of lire from these rackets, and also participated in several robberies and kidnappings, with the complicity of the Banda dei Marsigliesi, headed by Albert Bergamelli.

Rapid Support Forces.description: Sudanese paramilitary force originating from the Janjaweed militias used in the Darfur conflict. Formed in August 2013 under Muhammad Dagalo (Hemedti). Fights the Sudanese Armed Forces in a civil war since 2023, establishing a parallel government in 2025. Accused of war crimes, genocide, and human rights abuses.

descriptions: Al-Bara Battalion is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Al-Bara Battalion

descriptions: AWB is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... AWB

descriptions: Coalition of Patriots for Change is listed as an ally of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Coalition of Patriots for Change

descriptions: Houthi movement is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Houthi movement

descriptions: JEM is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... JEM

descriptions: Joint Darfur Force has been an opponent of RSF since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Joint Darfur Force (from 2023)

descriptions: Popular Resistance of Sudan is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Popular Resistance of Sudan

descriptions: SLM (al-Nur) is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SLM (al-Nur)

descriptions: SLM (Minnawi) is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SLM (Minnawi)

descriptions: SLM (Tambour) has been an opponent of RSF since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SLM (Tambour) (from 2023)

descriptions: SPLM-N (Agar) is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SPLM-N (Agar)

descriptions: SPLM-N (al-Hilu) has been an ally of RSF since 2025.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... SPLM-N (al-Hilu) (since 2025)

descriptions: Sudanese Awakening Revolutionary Council is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Sudanese Awakening Revolutionary Council

descriptions: Tamazuj is listed as an ally of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Tamazuj

descriptions: Wagner Group was an ally of RSF until early 2024.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Wagner Group (until early 2024)

descriptions: Wagner Group provided training and equipment to RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Leaked documents and sources reportedly indicate that the Wagner Group has provided training and equipment, including armored vehicles and helicopter gunships, to Hemedti's forces.

descriptions: Infobox lists Rapid Support Forces as an ally of Wagner Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: List: ... Rapid Support Forces

Breed Motorcycle Club.description: The Breed Motorcycle Club was a one-percenter motorcycle club founded in Asbury Park, New Jersey in 1965 by Salvatore DeIulio. It engaged in drug trafficking, extortion, and other criminal activities, and was involved in conflicts with the Hells Angels and Pagans. The club disbanded in 2006 after prominent members were indicted on racketeering and drug trafficking charges.

descriptions: The Breed absorbed the Aces and Eights Motorcycle Club in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: The Breed patched over the Riverside , New Jersey–based Aces and Eights Motorcycle Club and the Elizabeth , New Jersey–based Branded Motorcycle Club in 1983

descriptions: The Breed absorbed the Branded Motorcycle Club in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: The Breed patched over the Riverside , New Jersey–based Aces and Eights Motorcycle Club and the Elizabeth , New Jersey–based Branded Motorcycle Club in 1983

descriptions: The Breed and Hells Angels fought a large-scale brawl in Cleveland in 1971, with multiple deaths.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 1971, the club engaged in a confrontation with the Hells Angels in Cleveland , Ohio which resulted in the deaths of five people.

descriptions: Former Breed members joined the Outlaws and formed a new chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: Several Breed members patched over to the Outlaws and established a chapter in Kensington, Philadelphia.

descriptions: The Breed had a rivalry with the Pagans, which contributed to the club's decline.
edges.evidence_quote: The conflict with the Hells Angels, as well as infighting, law enforcement efforts and a rivalry with the Pagans , led to the Breed decreasing in numbers

descriptions: The Warlocks kidnapped a Breed chapter president in retaliation for assaults by Breed members.
edges.evidence_quote: In December 1988, members of the Warlocks kidnapped the Breed's Bucks County chapter president Craig "Coyote" Gudkneckt in retaliation for several Warlocks being assaulted by Breed members

descriptions: Breed is a rival motorcycle gang of the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival motorcycle gangs include the ... Breed

descriptions: Infobox lists Breed MC as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Nations, Bandidos MC, Black Pistons MC, Breed MC, Buffalo crime family, Chicago Outfit, Detroit Partnership, Grim Reapers MC, Gypsy Joker MC, Hammerskins, New Orleans crime family, Pittsburgh crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The Outlaws are allied with the Breed.
edges.evidence_quote: The Outlaws are allied with the Bandidos, the Black Pistons, the Breed

descriptions: Pagans and Breed engaged in a gunfight in 1974.
edges.evidence_quote: two Pagan bikers, Michael Watson and George Coons, and a bystander, Thomas Connelly, were injured in a gunfight between Pagans and members of the Breed during the Philadelphia Custom Car, Speed and Cycle Show at the Philadelphia Civic Center .

descriptions: The Breed is a rival gang to the Warlocks.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival gangs include the Breed and the Florida Warlocks.

descriptions: Los Vitaches are special forces of Chapo Isidro (Guasave Cartel).
edges.evidence_quote: On 15 June 2025, video footage captured "Vitache Special Forces" of Chapo Isidro engaged in combat against "Los Ranas" of Chapitos in the Tierra Blanca neighborhood of Culiacán, Sinaloa.

descriptions: Mexican Mafia ordered West Side Longo to cooperate with East Side Longo against TRG.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mexican Mafia ordered the West Side Longo gang to put aside its rivalry with the East Side Longo and support their former rivals against the TRG.

descriptions: West Side Longo put aside rivalry with East Side Longo to cooperate against TRG.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mexican Mafia ordered the West Side Longo gang to put aside its rivalry with the East Side Longo and support their former rivals against the TRG.

descriptions: Pietraperzia was at war with Barrafranca in the early 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1990s, the Pietraperzia Mafia family entered into a war with the Barrafranca Mafia family

descriptions: Buonocore group clashed with Cesarano clan in 2017-2018.
edges.evidence_quote: I Buonocore sono giunti allo scontro con il clan Cesarano di Ponte Persica .

descriptions: Buonocore group sought to restore Matrone dominance.
edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Buonocore, alias "Zi' Peppe 'e Scafati", genero di Franco Matrone , voleva ripristinare il dominio dei Matrone su Scafati e dintorni.

descriptions: Drive & Marlowe is in alliance with or subsumed into Mali Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Many smaller local gangs are in alliance or have been subsumed into the Mali Boys, such as Drive & Marlowe (DM), Boundary, Coppermill, and Stoneydown.

Doghmush clan.description: A Palestinian clan from the Gaza Strip known for its long-running rivalry with Hamas. Involved in extortion, smuggling, arms dealing, and killings. Members have been affiliated with Fatah, Hamas, Popular Resistance Committees, and Al-Qaeda. The clan was behind the 2007 kidnapping of British journalist Alan Johnston.

descriptions: Clan members are affiliated or aligned with Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the clan are affiliated or aligned with various Palestinian and Islamist groups, including Fatah, Hamas, Popular Resistance Committees, and Al-Qaeda.

descriptions: Mumtaz Doghmush, a clan leader, led the Army of Islam.
edges.evidence_quote: Mumtaz Doghmush, who was involved in the kidnapping of Gilad Shalit, led the Army of Islam by 2008.

descriptions: Clan members proclaimed themselves as the Army of Islam.
edges.evidence_quote: Clan members affiliated with Al-Qaeda were involved in the kidnapping and holding of the British journalist Alan Johnston ... The clan members proclaimed themselves as the Jaysh al-Islām (Army of Islam).

descriptions: The clan has a long-running rivalry with Hamas.
edges.evidence_quote: The Doghmush family ... is a Palestinian clan from the Gaza Strip known for its long-running rivalry with Hamas.

descriptions: The clan engaged in violent clashes with Hamas security forces after Hamas took over Gaza.
edges.evidence_quote: After Hamas' takeover of Gaza, the Doghmush clan was often involved in violent and deadly clashes with Hamas security forces.

descriptions: Hamas clashed with the clan during the Gaza war and allegedly executed its leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Israeli news outlets reported that Hamas had clashed with the family during the war and executed Doghmush, although the family denied this.

descriptions: The clan killed Hamas members, and Hamas retaliated by killing a clan member and arresting others.
edges.evidence_quote: After the announcement of the 2025 October ceasefire, the clan killed two Hamas members in Gaza City, including the son of a military intelligence head. A day later, Hamas killed a clan member and arrested 30 others.

descriptions: Dragoons MC is a support club allied with Cossacks MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dragoons MC (support club)

descriptions: as-Sabirin is an offshoot of PIJ.
edges.evidence_quote: Iran is now supporting an offshoot of PIJ called as-Sabirin

descriptions: Commisso is allied with Rumbo-Galea-Figliomeni in Siderno.
edges.evidence_quote: A Siderno sono alleati con le famiglie Rumbo - Galea - Figliomeni

descriptions: The two sets held a public peace meeting after Nipsey Hussle's death in 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: This started with a public meeting between the Swamp Crips and Campanella Park Pirus at Van Ness Park.

descriptions: La Ronda 88 is listed as an ally of Cártel de Tláhuac in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: CJNG , Fuerza Anti-Unión , La Familia Michoacana , Células delictivas locales y de menor importancia como La Ronda 88 y Los Guerreros

descriptions: White Fence has territorial conflicts with KAMSTERS X3.
edges.evidence_quote: White Fence has pushed itself into many territory-based beefs ... engaging in territorial beefs with neighborhoods like Tiny Boys X3 (TBS), KAMSTERS X3 (KAM), Armernian Power X3 (APX3), and many other gangs

descriptions: The Milanese faction of Cursoti is allied with the Piacenti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo momento risulta legata da alleanza ai clan Cappello , Sciuto-Tigna e Piacenti detti Ceusi .
